text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 79 

DRG_OUTLIER_PMT_AMT 

LABEL: DRG Outlier Approved Payment Amount ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The amount of additional payment (rounded to whole dollars) approved due to an outlier situation over 
the DRG allowance for the stay. 

SHORT NAME: OUTLRAMT 

LONG NAME: DRG_OUTLIER_PMT_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the DRG
